case_title: HAYLEY LUKE VS. MANJIT SINGH ET AL

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-06-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-17-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-30-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-28-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST HAYLEY LUKE, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-28-2017, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-14-2017. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-12-2018 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
